name: @acl/console
description: ACL 控制台（阶段 1 占位骨架）

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/styles dist/scripts && cp src/styles/global.css dist/styles/global.css && cp src/scripts/dashboard-tabs.js dist/scripts/dashboard-tabs.js && cp src/scripts/console-app.js dist/scripts/console-app.js
